channel.title: Quantum Surety Bonds — Texas Surety Bond Guides
channel.description: Texas surety bond guides, notary bond requirements, contractor bond requirements, and licensing tips from a TDI-licensed surety agency.

item.title: Texas Roofing Contractor Bond Requirements 2026 | City & TDLR License
item.description: Texas roofing contractor bond requirements by city in 2026. Bond amounts, who requires them, what they cost, and how to get bonded same-day.
item.dc:creator: Quantum Surety

item.title: Texas Plumbing Contractor Bond Requirements 2026 | TDLR & City License
item.description: Complete guide to Texas plumbing contractor bond requirements in 2026. TDLR bond, city bonds, how much it costs, and how to get bonded fast.
item.dc:creator: Quantum Surety

item.title: Texas HVAC Contractor Bond Requirements 2026 | TDLR & City License
item.description: Everything Texas HVAC contractors need to know about surety bond requirements in 2026. TDLR bond amounts, city bonds, how to apply, and what it costs.
item.dc:creator: Quantum Surety

item.title: Texas Contractor Bond Requirements by City (2026)
item.description: Contractor bond requirements for every major Texas city in 2026. Dallas, Houston, Austin, San Antonio, Fort Worth, El Paso, and more — bond amounts, licensing agencies, and how to get bonded fast.
item.dc:creator: Quantum Surety

item.title: Texas Performance Bond Requirements & Cost Guide (2026)
item.description: Complete guide to Texas performance bonds in 2026: who needs them, how much they cost (0.5%–3%), legal requirements under Texas Gov. Code § 2253 and the Miller Act, and how to get approved fast.
item.dc:creator: Quantum Surety

item.title: Texas Bid Bond Requirements 2026: What Contractors Need to Know
item.description: Texas bid bond requirements for 2026: who needs one, when it's required, how much it costs, and how to get same-day approval.
item.dc:creator: Quantum Surety

item.title: Texas GDN Bond Requirements 2026: What Every Motor Vehicle Dealer Needs to Know
item.description: Complete guide to Texas GDN bond requirements. What a GDN bond is, why it's required under §503.033, all 6 dealer license types, bond amount, and what happens if you operate without one.
item.dc:creator: Quantum Surety

item.title: How Much Does a Texas GDN Bond Cost in 2026?
item.description: A Texas GDN dealer bond costs $100–$300 per year for most dealers. Full cost breakdown by credit tier, why it's cheaper than most expect, and how to get the lowest rate.
item.dc:creator: Quantum Surety

item.title: Texas Dealer License Renewal: GDN Bond Checklist & TxDMV Steps
item.description: Step-by-step GDN bond renewal checklist for Texas dealers — TxDMV eLICENSING instructions, key deadlines, common mistakes, and what happens if your bond lapses.
item.dc:creator: Quantum Surety

item.title: Texas TDLR Contractor Bond 2026: Everything Licensed Tradespeople Need to Know
item.description: Complete guide to Texas TDLR contractor bonds in 2026. Which trades require a bond, how much it costs, how to file, and what changes are coming.
item.dc:creator: Quantum Surety

item.title: How Much Does a Texas Contractor License Bond Cost? (2026 Guide)
item.description: Find out exactly what a Texas contractor license bond costs in 2026. Rates by trade, credit score, and bond amount — TDLR, city bonds, electrical, HVAC, and plumbing.
item.dc:creator: Quantum Surety

item.title: Texas Electrical Contractor Bond Requirements 2026 | TDLR & City License
item.description: Everything Texas electricians need to know about surety bond requirements in 2026. TDLR bond, city bonds (Dallas, Houston, Austin), costs, and how to file.
item.dc:creator: Quantum Surety

item.title: Texas Notary Bond Renewal Under SB693 2026: What Every Renewing Notary Must Do
item.description: Renewing your Texas notary commission in 2026? SB693 added a mandatory education course and journal requirement. Step-by-step checklist plus 5 FAQs.
item.dc:creator: Quantum Surety

item.title: Texas Contractors: Get Your Bond and Pull Your Permits in One Day
item.description: A practical same-day workflow for DFW contractors: secure your license bond, identify every required permit, and submit with fewer delays.
item.dc:creator: Quantum Surety

item.title: Texas Notary Bond Requirements 2026: What SB693 Changes for New and Renewing Notaries
item.description: Senate Bill 693 took effect January 1, 2026 and changed Texas notary law significantly — mandatory education, new criminal penalties, 10-year record retention.
item.dc:creator: Quantum Surety

item.title: How Much Does a Texas Notary Bond Cost in 2026?
item.description: A Texas notary bond costs $50 for the full 4-year term — no credit check, no annual renewals. Here's exactly what you get and what the SOS fees are.
item.dc:creator: Quantum Surety

item.title: Texas Notary vs. Notary Signing Agent: What's the Difference?
item.description: A notary public and a notary signing agent are not the same thing. Here's what each role requires, what bonds and insurance you need, and which path makes more sense.
item.dc:creator: Quantum Surety
